Container.Name: OppaiLib
Container.Overview: OppaiLib — a private, self-hosted, encrypted media library for adult content (videos, GIFs, images, comics, and game entries) with tagging, URL scraping, and fully local AI auto-tagging. Also includes Libby, an in-app chat companion with importable character cards, which talks to an OpenAI-compatible LLM you run yourself. Everything stays on your box: no cloud storage, no cloud AI, no telemetry.
Container.Description: Self-hosted encrypted NSFW media library. Set a strong master passphrase — it encrypts all stored media and CANNOT be recovered if lost.

Config.Name: Config
Config.Description: Keystore and site parsers. The AI model ships inside the image at /opt/oppailib/models and is not stored here.

Config.Name: Master Passphrase
Config.Description: Encrypts all media. SAVE THIS — losing it means losing your library. Leave blank on first run to have one generated (check the logs).

Config.Name: AI Device
Config.Description: cpu or cuda (cuda needs GPU passthrough and a CUDA build of libonnxruntime; falls back to cpu with a warning)

Config.Name: AI Video Frames
Config.Description: Frames sampled per video/GIF before merging their tags (capped at 32). Each frame costs one ffmpeg decode plus one inference, so raising this makes video tagging slower but more thorough.

Config.Name: Respect robots.txt
Config.Description: Honor robots.txt before fetching. Set to false only for a site you own or are authorized to archive, when Fetch returns 'blocked by robots.txt'.

Config.Name: Chat LLM URL
Config.Description: OpenAI-compatible endpoint for Libby chat — LM Studio, llama.cpp, Ollama's /v1 bridge, or text-generation-webui. Example: http://192.168.1.10:5000/v1 . Blank disables chat (Libby falls back to built-in local replies). Chat becomes ready once that API reports a loaded model; load models in its own UI.

Config.Name: Chat Model
Config.Description: Optional fallback model name, for chat servers that require a model field in the request.

Config.Name: Chat API Key
Config.Description: Optional. Needed only when your chat server was started with an API key (e.g. text-generation-webui's --api-key).

Config.Name: Image Generation URL
Config.Description: Local image generator for the Create tab: an InvokeAI server (default port 9090) or Automatic1111 / SD.Next (the /sdapi/v1 flavour, default port 7860). Which API it speaks is detected automatically. Blank disables the feature. Also settable at runtime in Settings.

Config.Name: Web Idle Timeout (minutes)
Config.Description: How long a browser session may sit unused before it is signed out. Browser sessions are also signed out whenever the container restarts. The Android app is exempt from both — it stays signed in. Set to 0 to disable the idle timeout.

Config.Name: Session Lifetime (hours)
Config.Description: How long a signed-in session stays valid before requiring a fresh sign-in. Applies to the Android app as well as browsers.
